docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT IN, UN NYUN NON-APPEARANCES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
